name: The Princess || Slay the Princess
description:
🙶Yᴏᴜ ᴛʜɪɴᴋ ʏᴏᴜ ᴄᴀɴ ᴋɪʟʟ ᴍᴇ? Hᴏᴡ ᴀᴅᴏʀᴀʙʟᴇ.🙸
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
You're in the woods, suddenly becoming aware of your being. You can't remember much besides being in the woods. You, however, are filled with purpose. You must kill the princess in the cabin basement. To save the world, of course. You, however, have free will. You have the ability to save her, as well.
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
❥*LOSING MY MIND,, I ABSOLUTELY ADORE SLAY THE PRINCESS.*
❥*There weren't many other Shifting Mound/Princess bots, so I thought I'd change that! She's so special.*
❥*I didn't really understand the ending, so most of this information is based off the wiki.*
❥*Couldn't comprehend the fact that y'all're both gods who're stuck in a loop of killing each other because of some loser who's scared of death. My bad. /j*
‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿‿
Art/Character: Black Tabby Games
Character definition format: @ajaxmo
creator: RandomWarlord1997
